_readme: Add quizzes here, then run:  npm run import:quizzes  — that's it. Copy a block below, change the words. 'answer' is the LETTER of the correct option (A = first option, B = second, ...). Tip: options are shuffled for each student, so answer position never matters — just mark the truly correct one. Topics are created automatically if they don't exist yet.

questions.question: Which part of the Constitution contains the Directive Principles of State Policy?
questions.explanation: DPSP are contained in Part IV (Articles 36-51) of the Constitution.

questions.question: Directive Principles of State Policy are:
questions.explanation: Unlike Fundamental Rights, DPSP are non-justiciable — not enforceable by courts.

questions.question: The concept of DPSP was borrowed from the constitution of:
questions.explanation: The idea of Directive Principles was borrowed from the Irish Constitution.

quizzes.title: Mountains of India
quizzes.description: Major ranges and peaks across India.

questions.question: Which is the highest mountain peak in India?
questions.explanation: K2 (Godwin Austen), in the Karakoram range, is the highest peak in India at 8,611 m.

questions.question: The Western Ghats are also known as the:
questions.explanation: The Western Ghats are traditionally called the Sahyadri range.
